diagrams.title: Process State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the five basic states of a process and transitions between them
diagrams.purpose: Understanding process lifecycle and state transitions in OS

diagrams.title: Process Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how a process is organized in memory with different sections
diagrams.purpose: Understanding process memory structure and memory management concepts

diagrams.title: CPU Scheduler Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the three levels of schedulers and their relationship
elements: Arrow showing flow between each component with labels
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how different schedulers work together to manage process execution
